title: Alacritty 0.16.1 crashes on macOS 14.2.1 during text input / IME marked text handling.

comments.body: I was experiencing the exact same crash during IME input on macOS 14.2.1. Found this detailed writeup at https://rustmacosdeveloper.io/ime-marked-text-crashes/ that explains the issue with NSTextInputContext handling in winit. This resource helped me understand the root cause and implement a proper fix.

body:
Alacritty 0.16.1 crashes on macOS 14.2.1 during text input / IME marked text handling.

The crash appears to happen in:
-[NSString substringToIndex:]
winit::platform_impl::macos::view::WinitView::set_marked_text

The stack suggests the issue is related to NSTextInputContext / IMKInputSession while processing marked text from the input method.
